title: Tessellum Composer Pipeline Sidecar
description: Per-step pipeline declarations for a Tessellum capture/digest skill. Loaded by `tessellum.composer.skill_extractor.load_pipeline_metadata` when a skill canonical's frontmatter declares `pipeline_metadata: ./<skill>.pipeline.yaml`. The sidecar is the typed contract; the canonical is the human-readable procedure. Both are authoritative — Composer pairs them via section_id anchors.

version.description: Sidecar format version. Default '1.0' if omitted.

section_id.description: Anchor id matching `<!-- :: section_id = X :: -->` in the skill canonical.

role.description: CORE = compiled into pipeline_dag (LLM-dispatched); DEFERRED = visible to compiler but not auto-dispatched; INFRA = dropped, no LLM call (informational/glue).

aggregation.description: How the step instance is multiplied — once per leaf, once across all leaves of a cross_leaf scope, or once for the whole corpus.

batchable.description: If true, scheduler may batch multiple per_leaf instances into a single LLM call (column-oriented dispatch).

depends_on.description: section_ids this step depends on. Forward references not allowed; compiler enforces topological order.

materializer.description: Materializer key. Resolves via `tessellum.composer.contracts.MATERIALIZER_CONTRACTS`. Required for CORE/DEFERRED steps; INFRA steps default to no_op.

wire_format.description: Optional override of the materializer contract's declared wire_format. Usually omitted — the contract is authoritative.

operation_verb.description: Optional override of the materializer contract's declared operation_verb. PRODUCE = write new; APPLY = overwrite existing; DESCRIBE = informational, no side effect.

applies_to_files.description: Static list of vault-relative paths the step applies to. APPLY-mode steps require non-empty.

applies_to_files_query.description: Declarative query resolved against the unified DB at compile time. Mutually informative with `applies_to_files`. Requires the indexer (not shipped in v0.0.9 — Wave 1 loaders accept the field but cannot resolve it until the indexer ships).

expected_output_schema.description: JSON Schema the agent's response must conform to. Required for CORE/DEFERRED steps. The compiler pre-validates declarations before LLM dispatch.

prompt_template.description: Jinja-style template the compiler renders into the agent's user message. `{{leaf.X}}` resolves at compile time; `{{upstream.Y}}` at runtime; `{{existing.Z}}` from APPLY-mode ground-truth files.

output_key.description: Identifier for this step's output that downstream `{{upstream.<key>}}` placeholders resolve against.

mcp_dependencies.description: MCPs this step depends on. Compiler resolves each entry against `tessellum.composer.contracts.MCP_CONTRACTS` and raises ContractViolation on drift before any LLM call fires.

name.description: Stable MCP identifier (lowercase, hyphens/underscores allowed). Matches a key in `tessellum.composer.contracts.MCP_CONTRACTS`. The default registry is empty — Tessellum has no built-in MCPs; users register their own at runtime.

calls.description: Specific MCP tool names this step invokes. Each name MUST appear in the corresponding `MCPContract.available_tools` (loaded from a co-located JSON snapshot when registered); the compiler raises UNKNOWN_MCP_TOOL otherwise.

required.description: If true (default), missing MCP at runtime fails the step. If false, the dispatcher returns a degraded result and the step's prompt_template MUST include a degradation branch handling the absence.

kind.description: Query kind handled by the compiler's `_resolve_applies_to_files_query`. Resolution depends on the indexer (not shipped in v0.0.9).

max_files.description: Per-call cap on resolved paths. Default 10.

exclude_dirs.description: Vault-relative directory prefixes to exclude. Defaults vary by kind.
